name: zhaoyun-adou
description: 赵云与阿斗 · 文字合成塔防（纯 JS / Canvas，Capacitor 包装为 iOS 应用）

scripts.cap:copy: npm run prepare:www && npx cap copy ios
scripts.build:ios:no-sign: npm run build:bundle && npm run prepare:www && npx cap copy ios && cd ios && xcodebuild -workspace App.xcworkspace -scheme App -sdk iphoneos -configuration Release CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO COMPILER_INDEX_STORE_ENABLE=NO build
scripts.test: node smoke.js && node tests/events.test.js && node tests/layout.test.js
